: 在 Base URL 填入中转站地址即可，API Key 填中转站提供的 K: : Just fill in the transfer station address in the Base URL, and fill in the API Key with the Key provided by the transfer station.
: 大多数提供商通过 LiteLLM 统一处理，支持自动重试和负载均衡: : Most providers unify processing via LiteLLM, supporting automatic retries and load balancing
: 百度、MiniMax、豆包因 API 格式特殊，使用专用适配器: : Baidu, MiniMax, and Doubao use special adapters due to their special API formats.

• LLM API 配置错误或额度不足: • LLM API configuration error or insufficient quota
• 与分析使用的 LLM 独立配置，互不影响: • Configured independently from the LLM used for analysis, without affecting each other
• 仓库访问权限不足（私有仓库需配置 Token）: • Insufficient warehouse access rights (private warehouses need to be configured with Token)
• 公开仓库无需配置 Token: • No need to configure Token for public warehouse
• 向量维度影响存储空间和检索精度: • Vector dimensions affect storage space and retrieval accuracy
• 嵌入模型用于 Agent 扫描的代码语义搜索 (RAG): • Embedded model for code semantic search (RAG) for Agent scanning
• 私有仓库需要配置对应平台的 Token: • Private warehouses need to configure the Token of the corresponding platform

数据存储在后端 PostgreSQL 数据库中，支持多用户、多设备同步。建议定期: Data is stored in the back-end PostgreSQL database, supporting multi-user and multi-device synchronization. It is recommended to export backups regularly.
数据存储在后端 PostgreSQL 数据库中，通过 REST API 访问。支: Data is stored in a backend PostgreSQL database and accessed via a REST API. Supports multi-user and multi-device synchronization.
数据存储在浏览器 IndexedDB 中，完全本地化，隐私安全。: Data is stored in the browser IndexedDB, fully localized and private.
数据存储在浏览器本地: Data is stored locally in the browser
